[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00101000 2
1 10001001 3
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 11010010 4
5 10110100 4
6 10010110 4
7 11111011 7
